key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to refresh usage data in seconds

key.name: display-mode
key.description: How to display usage in the panel: 'text' for percentage text, 'bar' for a progress bar, or 'both' for both

key.name: icon-style
key.description: Icon style: 'color' for the original colored icon, 'monochrome' for a desaturated monochrome icon

key.name: show-icon
key.description: Whether to show the Claude icon in the top bar

key.name: proxy-url
key.description: HTTP proxy URL (e.g., http://localhost:11809). Leave empty to use no proxy.

key.name: profiles
key.description: JSON string containing an array of profiles with name, path, and showInPanel

key.name: file-monitoring-enabled
key.description: When enabled, watches Claude config directories for session activity and refreshes shortly after activity stops. When disabled, only the periodic refresh timer triggers API calls.

key.name: debounce-delay
key.description: Seconds of file-activity silence before triggering a usage refresh

key.name: debounce-min-interval
key.description: Minimum seconds between consecutive activity-triggered usage refreshes for a profile
